Gearbox

Gearbox CX14

Distinctive durable control feel, often chosen by players who like Gearbox construction.

A control-oriented Gearbox option for players who value durability and feedback more than trampoline-like pop.

TypeControl
Shapeelongated / quad
CoreSSTCore solid-span control construction
FaceCarbon fiber
Reference price$199.99
Price noteTypical Gearbox CX line pricing varies by retailer and closeout status
Level3.0, 3.5, 4.0
TraitsControl, Touch, Durability
Used by / lineGearbox control users
Official product page

Prices, sponsors, rankings, DUPR, and product availability change. Verify on the linked official source before publishing buying advice.

Prices, specs, and approved-equipment status can change. Treat this as a research dashboard and verify official retailer and equipment-list pages before purchase.

Play profile

Power7.2
Control8.9
Spin7.6
Forgiveness7.8

Scores are editorial comparison notes based on product positioning and common review signals; they are not lab measurements.
